## What this changes

<!-- One or two sentences. -->

## Definition of Done

- [ ] Core still imports with zero third-party packages
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] `ruff check .` and `black --check .` are clean
- [ ] Docs and `CHANGELOG.md` updated
- [ ] No known regression against older Minitels (Constitution rule VII)

## Constitution check

- [ ] No transport/implementation jargon leaked into user-facing text (rule I)
- [ ] Nothing new made the USB cable a prerequisite for core value (rule II)
- [ ] No "recommended" connection labels (rule IV)
